title: Yale - Y110B/25/113/1 Standard Security 25mm Brass Padlock - Open Steel Shackle - 3 Keys
features: DESIGNED FOR INDOOR USAGE : Helps you secure your locker, rucksack or other belongings you need to secure indoors.
SETTING UP QUALITY STANDARDS: Tested up to 48 hours for corrosion resistance to ensure protection against weather conditions.
BODY MATERIAL: Brass body with a 4 pin cylinder, single locking and steel shackle.
DIMENSIONS: Body Width: 25mmBody Height: 26mmBody Depth: 11mmShackle Ø: 4.2 Weight: 65g
AN EXCLUSIVE YALE DESIGN: With a range of different sizes from 15mm to 70mm to suit your security needs.
description: From the manufacturer Yale, inspired by the past, is creating the future of security. With 180 years of manufacturing expertise, we are introducing our padlocks with an exclusive Yale design and tested to EN12320:2012 standard for added security and reassurance, built with you in mind. Designed for indoor usage Suitable for your gym locker, rucksack, tool box or other belongings you want to keep safe and secure indoors. Yale takes care of your possessions; you take care of the rest. Setting up quality standards Tested to EN12320:2012 to simulate forms of attack such as cutting, twisting and pulling of shackle. Plus tested up to 96 hours for corrosion resistance to withstand different weather conditions for total peace of mind. Enhanced security Even those DIY tools in your shed can be kept safe and secure, with a hardened steel shackle and double locking for added security, built with you in mind. Exclusive Yale design Available in different sizes with long or standard shackle for your every security need. 15mm/ 20mm/ 25mm/ 30mm/ 35mm/ 40mm/ 50mm/ 60mm or 70mm Brass padlocks 22mm/ 30mm or 40mm Brass and chrome combination padlocks 25mm/ 32mm / 38mm or 50mm Aluminium padlocks 20mm/ 28mm or 38mm Aluminium combination padlocks Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,787 3.7 out of 5 stars 182 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,027 3.8 out of 5 stars 843 Price £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £6.98 £ 6 . 98 £7.88 £ 7 . 88 £5.95 £ 5 . 95 Suitable for Indoors, lockers, toolbox and rucksack Indoors, lockers, toolbox and rucksack Indoors, lockers, toolbox and rucksack Indoors, lockers, toolbox and rucksack Tested to simulate forms of attack such as cutting, pulling and twisting of shackle (30mm and above) ✓ X ✓ X Hardened Steel Shackle to protect against cutting of shackle (for 30mm and above padlocks) ✓ X ✓ X Tested to 10,000 cycles for opening and closing of shackle (30mm and above padlocks) ✓ X X X Double locking for added security ✔ (30mm - 70mm only) X ✔ (32mm/38mm and 50mm only) X Corrosion resistance Up to 48 hours (15mm - 25mm) Up to 96 hours (All brass padlocks) Up to 96 hours Up to 48 hours Up to 48 hours Colours Brass Brass and silver Black, grey, teal & pink Black, red, gold & silver Keys or dials 3 keys 3 & 4 Dials 3 Key 3 & 4 dials CEN Rating 1-2 ✓ 1 - no data
